stemHtml: The wing angle of incidence usually varies from root to tip. This is called wing washout and its purpose is...

options.a: to increase lift at the tip, thus equalising lift across the wing.
options.b: to ensure that stall occurs at the root first, maximising controllability.
options.c: to reduce induced drag caused by wing tip vortices.
options.d: to reduce lift at the tip, thus equalising lift across the wing.
